mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user_warehouse where warehouse_id=#{warehouseId}
select warehouse_id from sys_user_warehouse where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_user_warehouse where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user_warehouse(warehouse_id, user_id, status, tenant_id) values
(#{item.warehouseId},#{item.userId},#{item.status},#{item.tenantId})
mapper.update: update sys_user_warehouse uw inner join sys_user u on u.user_id = uw.user_id set uw.tenant_id = u.customer_id where uw.user_id = #{userId} and (uw.tenant_id is null or uw.tenant_id = '') and u.customer_id is not null and trim(u.customer_id) != ''

update sys_user_warehouse uw inner join fd_warehouse w on w.id = uw.warehouse_id set uw.tenant_id = w.tenant_id where uw.user_id = #{userId} and (uw.tenant_id is null or uw.tenant_id = '') and w.tenant_id is not null and trim(w.tenant_id) != ''

update sys_user_warehouse uw inner join sys_user u on u.user_id = uw.user_id set uw.tenant_id = u.customer_id where (uw.tenant_id is null or uw.tenant_id = '') and u.customer_id is not null and trim(u.customer_id) != ''

update sys_user_warehouse uw inner join fd_warehouse w on w.id = uw.warehouse_id set uw.tenant_id = w.tenant_id where (uw.tenant_id is null or uw.tenant_id = '') and w.tenant_id is not null and trim(w.tenant_id) != ''
